chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-5315 of 2015 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on CMA No.22466/2015. 2. For hearing of main case. 03.02.2026 Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, AAG. ------------- This is an old petition of 2015, which is more than ten years ago. It was last fixed on 09.08.2019, which is over six years ago. In the last six years, learned counsel for the petitioners has failed to diligently pursue this petition. Today, despite the lapse of six years, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that petitioners have lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
